GCommonRules.WildRules1: During any spin, whenever 1 or more Wild symbols appear on the reels, the win multiplier will be increased by 2 for each Wild symbol before wins are paid.
GCommonRules.WildRules2: All Wild and Scatter symbols will remain on the reels until the end of a spin.
GCommonRules.FreeSpinRules1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
GCommonRules.FreeSpinRules2: During any free spin, whenever 1 or more Wild symbols appear on the reels, the win multiplier will be increased by 2 for each Wild symbol before wins are paid.

GGameRules.GRDesc1: Emoji Riches is a 6 by 6 symbols combination video slot featuring increasing multiplier and travelling Wild symbol.

GRDesc2.value: The game is played with 10 base bet (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GRDesc2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations
GRDesc2.example: The game is played with 10 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 1.

GGameRules.GeneralRules1: At every spin, any combinations of 5 or more symbols touching horizontally or vertically will result in a winning combination.
GGameRules.GeneralRules2: If there is one or more winning combination on the reels, all symbols that is not involved in a win will explode, allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
GGameRules.GeneralRules3: At every round, additional or increased winning combination will trigger more rounds until no more additional and increased winning combination.
GGameRules.GeneralRules4: When there is no more additional or increased winning combination, payout is made for each symbol according to the Paytable.
GGameRules.GeneralRules5: A combination win in cash is equal to the value shown in the "Paytable" multiplied by bet size and bet level.
GGameRules.GeneralRules6: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
